name: node-libcurl
description: Empty stand-in. The monorepo root hoists the real node-libcurl (a native module) where Zudoku's @whatwg-node/fetch ponyfill would pick it up via parent-directory resolution and break the rollup build on the .node binding. The ponyfill only uses libcurl when resolvable, so an empty module here makes it fall back to plain fetch.
